x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Each additional channel extends AI self-service reach.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_channel");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=3?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active VA channels",finding:n<3?"Only "+n+" VA channels. Now Assist conversational AI should be deployed across multiple channels for maximum self-service reach.":n+" VA channels -- Now Assist reaches employees across "+n+" deployment channels."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c4e
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Each additional channel extends AI self-service reach.]]></ai_justification><check_name>VA Channel Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_channel");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=3?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active VA channels",finding:n<3?"Only "+n+" VA channels. Now Assist conversational AI should be deployed across multiple channels for maximum self-service reach.":n+" VA channels -- Now Assist reaches employees across "+n+" deployment channels."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module><number>CHK0000505</number><order>50</order><remediation_guidance>Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c4e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>VA Channel Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c4e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
